mapper.select: SELECT ps.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM sys_player_show ps LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ps.user_id = u.id ORDER BY ps.created_at DESC
SELECT ps.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM sys_player_show ps LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ps.user_id = u.id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ps.created_at DESC
SELECT ps.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM sys_player_show ps LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ps.user_id = u.id WHERE ps.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_player_show (user_id, image_url, description, likes, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_player_show SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
